response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer with deep web/full-stack and some systems-level experience, but the role demands current, hands-on C++/STL expertise in industrial automation with SDL and IEC 62443 security practices. Their only professional C++ work was a short stint at National Instruments a decade ago; recent work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. There is no evidence of MQTT, industrial protocols, message brokers at scale in C++, or industrial cybersecurity exposure, making them a poor match despite general seniority.
strengths: Extensive overall engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Low-latency, high-throughput systems work (async I/O, fibers, caching) at Sociomantic, showing performance engineering aptitude
Strong craftsmanship culture: TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, workshops, and open-source contributions
concerns: Minimal professional C++ experience — roughly 7 months in 2014–2015, none since
No industrial automation, IEC 62443, SDL, MQTT, or OT/industrial protocol background
Recent focus is web/full-stack (TypeScript/Node.js), diverging from the role's core C++ systems requirements

key_factors.factor: No industrial cybersecurity or IEC 62443 experience
Proven high-performance and event-driven systems experience
